title: Results pointer (current.json)
description: Pointer at results_prefix/current.json. Phase-2 writers emit v2 keys, while readers still accept legacy latest/last_passing payloads during migration.

latest_run_id.description: Run id of the most recently promoted run

last_passing_run_id.description: Run id of the most recently promoted passing run

updated_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of last update

promoted_by_workflow_run_id.description: GitHub handoff workflow run id that committed the promotion

latest.description: Legacy run id of the most recent run

last_passing.description: Legacy run id of the most recent passing run

updated_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of last update
